tagline: Specialising in Providing Services to the Commercial Sector
heroHeading: A complete electrical package, from first sketch to final sign-off.
heroSubheading: Total Electric Solutions has delivered commercial electrical, lighting and data installations across London and the South East since 2006, from initial survey and design through to NICEIC-certified handover.

stats.label: in-house project management, survey to sign-off

whyChooseUs.title: 40+ years of commercial experience
whyChooseUs.body: Founded by Ian French in 2006 after decades in office refurbishment, commercial and industrial fit-out, so every project is led by people who have seen it before.

whyChooseUs.title: Full project management, start to finish
whyChooseUs.body: One team carries a project from the initial building survey and design through tendering, installation, and Building Control sign-off, with no handoffs and no gaps.

whyChooseUs.title: NICEIC certified, always
whyChooseUs.body: Every installation is tested and certified to NICEIC standards, with full documentation, O&M manuals and Building Control paperwork provided as standard.

recognition: Named one of the UK's top five Small Family Businesses by the Small Awards in 2017.
